footer.description: Breakfasts and brunches, delivered to your door in under 45 minutes. Alpes-Maritimes, 7 days a week.

hero.subtitle: Breakfasts and brunches, delivered to your door in under 45 minutes. Alpes-Maritimes, 7 days a week.

about.label: Our story
about.title: The pleasure of simple things
about.p1: Breakfast Time was born from a simple belief: breakfast deserves as much attention as a great dinner. Every morning, we carefully prepare fresh, local and seasonal products to turn your mornings into exceptional moments.
about.p2: Whether for a gentle wake-up at home, a team meeting or welcoming your guests, our menus adapt to every occasion. Sweet, savoury, hot and cold drinks — everything is designed to make your life easier.
about.p3: Based in the Alpes-Maritimes, we deliver 7 days a week with a single promise: every bite should be a pleasure.

howItWorks.label: Simple & fast
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to a perfect morning, effortlessly.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our menu and build your ideal breakfast from our set menus or à la carte options.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Place your order directly on our website in a few clicks, or via our Deliveroo and Uber Eats partners.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Delivered to your door on the same day or on a scheduled delivery. Fresh and ready to eat.

why.label: Our commitments
why.title: Why Breakfast Time?
why.subtitle: More than just a delivery: a morning experience designed for you.
why.b1Desc: Prepared the same morning with carefully selected ingredients.
why.b2Desc: We favour producers and artisans from the Alpes-Maritimes.
why.b3Desc: Delivered in under 45 min, 7 days a week, from 8am to 3pm.
why.b4Desc: Beautifully presented and ready to enjoy.

finalCta.title: Your morning deserves
finalCta.subtitle: Breakfast or brunch, delivered in 30 to 45 minutes with fresh products prepared the same morning. Order now.

testimonials.label: Reviews
testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Better mornings thanks to Breakfast Time.

reviews.name: Marie L.
reviews.text: The croissants are incredibly fresh — you can really tell the difference. On-time delivery, nothing to complain about.

reviews.name: Thomas D.
reviews.text: I gave a box as a birthday gift for my partner and she was delighted. Beautiful presentation and delicious products.

reviews.name: Sophie M.
reviews.text: We order every Friday for the team. Simple, reliable, and everyone loves it every time.

reviews.name: Julie R.
reviews.text: The pain au chocolat was still warm when it arrived. I didn't know that was possible — now I order every weekend.

reviews.name: Alexandre B.
reviews.text: Order placed the evening before, delivered right on time the next morning. Perfect way to start the day.

reviews.name: Camille F.
reviews.text: The fruit juices are freshly squeezed — that's really what makes the difference. We can't do without them now.

reviews.name: Nicolas P.
reviews.text: We organised a brunch for 10 people and everything was perfect. Impeccable presentation and nothing missing.

reviews.name: Laura M.
reviews.text: Customer service is very responsive. A delivery issue one morning, sorted in 10 minutes. Truly professional.

reviews.name: Romain G.
reviews.text: We've been ordering regularly for 3 months now. Quality is consistent and the products are always fresh.

legal.s2Text:
This site is hosted by Vercel Inc.

legal.s3Text: All content on this site (texts, images, logos, graphics) is the exclusive property of Breakfast Time or its partners and is protected by French and international intellectual property laws. Any reproduction, representation or distribution, in whole or in part, without prior written authorisation is strictly prohibited.
legal.s4Text: Breakfast Time strives to keep the information published on this site as accurate and up-to-date as possible. However, Breakfast Time cannot be held liable for any errors, omissions or temporary unavailability of the site.
legal.s5Text: These legal notices are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, the competent courts of the Antibes jurisdiction shall have sole jurisdiction.

cgv.s1Text:
Breakfast Time
Pont du Lys – 06600 Antibes
SIREN: 507 940 070
cgv.s2Text: These Terms and Conditions of Sale apply to all orders for food products and delivery services placed with Breakfast Time, whether directly via our website or via our partner platforms.
cgv.s3Text: Our products are fresh food items prepared the same morning. They are available Monday to Sunday from 7am to 3pm, subject to availability. Breakfast Time reserves the right to modify its menu at any time.
cgv.s4Text: Any order placed on our site or via our partner platforms constitutes acceptance of these Terms and Conditions. The order is confirmed upon receipt of a confirmation email or notification.
cgv.s5Text: All prices are displayed in euros inclusive of all taxes. Breakfast Time reserves the right to modify its prices at any time. Payment is due at the time of ordering.
cgv.s6Text: Delivery is provided across the Alpes-Maritimes. Delivery times are indicative and Breakfast Time cannot be held liable for delays due to external circumstances (traffic, weather, etc.).
cgv.s7Text:
In accordance with Article L221-28 of the French Consumer Code, the right of withdrawal cannot be exercised for orders of perishable food products or for services provided on a specific date or with a specific frequency.

Accordingly, any confirmed order is final and binding.
cgv.s8Text:
Orders placed via partner platforms such as Uber Eats or Deliveroo are subject to the terms and conditions of those platforms.

Accordingly, the terms of cancellation, modification and refund are defined exclusively by those platforms.
cgv.s9Text: Any complaint relating to an order must be submitted within 24 hours of delivery to: contact@breakfast-time.fr. We undertake to respond as quickly as possible.
cgv.s10Text: These Terms and Conditions are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, an amicable solution will be sought as a priority. Failing that, the competent courts of the Antibes jurisdiction shall have sole jurisdiction.

privacy.s1Text:
Breakfast Time
Pont du Lys – 06600 Antibes
SIREN: 507 940 070
privacy.s2Intro: We collect the following data in the context of our services:
s2Items: Identification data: first name, last name, email address
Contact data: phone number, delivery address
Order data: products ordered, amount, delivery slot
Navigation data: technical cookies necessary for the website to function
Email address for the newsletter (voluntary subscription)
s3Items: Arrange delivery to the indicated address
Send you our newsletter (if you have consented)
Comply with our legal and accounting obligations
privacy.s4Text: The processing of your data is based on contract performance (orders), your consent (newsletter) and our legal obligations (accounting, tax).
privacy.s5Text: Your order data is retained for 5 years in accordance with legal accounting obligations. Newsletter data is retained until you unsubscribe.
privacy.s6Text: Your data is not sold to third parties. It may be shared with our technical service providers (hosting, database) strictly within the scope of our services. These providers are required to maintain the confidentiality of your data.
privacy.s7Intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
s7Items: Right of access to your personal data
Right to rectification of inaccurate data
Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")
privacy.s7Footer: To exercise these rights, contact us at: contact@breakfast-time.fr. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the relevant supervisory authority in your country.
privacy.s8Text: This site uses only technical cookies strictly necessary for its operation (user session, cart). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are placed without your consent.

menuSection.label: Breakfast & Brunch
menuSection.title: Compose your perfect
menuSection.subtitle: Full set menus or à la carte — you choose, we deliver.
menuSection.o1Desc: Thoughtfully designed menus — everything included, just pick your options. From the French Menu to the Full Brunch, we handle the rest.
menuSection.o2Desc: Pastries, breads, savoury, sweet, drinks… Choose each item à la carte and create the perfect brunch for your taste.
menuSection.o3Desc: For a moment together — pastry platters, cakes, pancakes… Place them in the centre and enjoy.
menuSection.o4Desc: Wedding, corporate, birthday… Personalised packages from €8/person to make every occasion unforgettable.
menuSection.footnote: Over 30 products available · Free delivery · 7 days a week

eventsPage.mariageAccroche: The most beautiful day deserves an exceptional buffet
eventsPage.mariageDescription: Celebrate your wedding with an elegant brunch. A generous buffet, customisable décor and discreet service for an unforgettable moment.
eventsPage.entrepriseDescription: A gourmet break to energise your team. Perfect for meetings, seminars, training sessions or team building. Delivery & setup included.
eventsPage.groupeDescription: Birthday, hen do, reunions with friends or family… A convivial and generous brunch for memorable moments.
